howItWorks.intro: This bullet drop calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Simple Drop
rules.formula: Drop = ½g × t² (adjusted for zero range)
rules.explanation: Gravity-based drop corrected for sight-in distance.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.a: Velocity, ballistic coefficient, distance, altitude, and wind.
A measure of a bullet's ability to resist air drag. Higher BC = less drop.
